cards.title: Run Without Skill
cards.description: Paste the prompt into a new chat inside your Project. Claude will respond immediately - save the output, you will compare it in Step 3.

cards.title: Add the Skill
cards.description: Navigate to Customize Claude and upload the Skill file to train your Minion.

steps.description: Click Customize Claude in the left sidebar of Claude.
Click Skills inside the Customize panel.
Click Add Skill, then Create Skill, then upload the skill file below.

cards.title: Run Same Prompt Again
cards.description: Copy the exact same prompt. Paste it into Claude. Watch what happens differently this time.
